metadata.title: Levani Levanidze – Web Developer & Photographer in Switzerland
metadata.description: Boost your online presence with Levani – expert in Webflow/Next.js websites and professional photography. Serving businesses across Geneva and Switzerland.

hero.text1: gained skills years of experience in web design and photography are helping me to be doing high standard service in online world

metadata.title: Latest Web Design & Photography Projects
metadata.description: Explore recent website and photography projects by Levani. Modern, responsive, and tailored for businesses in Switzerland.

pageHero.title2: I’m a UX/UI designer, Webflow/Next.js developer, and professional photographer specializing in creating user-friendly and responsive websites for businesses, with a focus on helping restaurants across Switzerland.

metadata.title: Professional Photography in Geneva & Switzerland
metadata.description: Levani offers high-end business photography across Geneva and Switzerland. Enhance your website and branding with impactful visuals.

pageHero.title2: Supporting businesses across Geneva and whole Switzerland with over 13 years of experience in professional photography. Winner of the Golden Camera by FEP in 2017, I specialize in creating stunning visuals that enhance your brand's online presence and attract more customers.
